description_long: This is a sleek, modern business jet with a streamlined fuselage and a low-wing configuration. The airplane features two turbofan engines mounted at the rear of the fuselage, just ahead of the T-tail, which provides stability and control. The wings are slightly swept back and have a moderate dihedral angle, contributing to aerodynamic efficiency. The landing gear is of the tricycle type, with a visible nose wheel and two main gear units under the wings. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage, with large, dark-tinted windows for pilot visibility. The exterior is primarily white with gold and black accent lines running along the fuselage and tail, giving it a polished, executive appearance.
description: A modern white business jet with rear-mounted twin engines, swept low wings, and a T-tail, accented by gold and black lines.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, cockpit windows, and the symmetrical low wings with visible engine nacelles at the rear.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full fuselage profile, cockpit placement, wing sweep, and the T-tail with gold and black striping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the twin rear-mounted engines, T-tail structure, and the dihedral angle of the wings.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile, including the landing gear, cockpit, and the detailed tail design.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with moderately swept wings and a slight dihedral angle; no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin turbofan engines mounted at the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: T-tail configuration with a single vertical stabilizer and high-mounted horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with one nose wheel and two main gear units.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with large, dark-tinted windows; likely multi-seat.
